task: place brown chip bag into white bowl
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A brown chip bag lies on a gray table, and a white bowl is positioned to its lower right. The chip bag is flexible and has a wide opening; the bowl is rigid with a circular rim. STRATEGY - First, grasp the chip bag at its body to avoid tearing, lift it, then transport it over the bowl, and finally place it into the bowl. Failure modes include dropping the chip bag during transport or misaligning it with the bowl. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the chip bag body; Step 2 grasp the body for a secure hold; Step 3 transport above the bowl; Step 4 lower into the bowl's opening.**
Goal: inside(brown_chip_bag, white_bowl)
Scene: brown_chip_bag, white_bowl, table
Step 1: reach(brown_chip_bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the brown chip bag
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, brown_chip_bag, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, brown_chip_bag) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(brown_chip_bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the brown chip bag
  contact: holding(brown_chip_bag) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(brown_chip_bag)
Step 3: transport(brown_chip_bag -> white_bowl)
  affordance_region: the opening of the white bowl
  spatial: above(brown_chip_bag, white_bowl, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(brown_chip_bag)
  done_when: above(brown_chip_bag, white_bowl, 0.05)
Step 4: place(brown_chip_bag -> white_bowl)
  affordance_region: the opening of the white bowl
  contact: surface_contact(brown_chip_bag, white_bowl) [completion]; released(brown_chip_bag) [completion]
  pose: inside(brown_chip_bag, white_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(brown_chip_bag, white_bowl) AND released(brown_chip_bag)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the brown chip bag
the body of the brown chip bag
the opening of the white bowl
the opening of the white bowl
